spec_match.rationale: Successfully probes the SpeechRecognition instance for 'quality' and other modern properties like 'unspokenPunctuation'.

interactive.rationale: Features a functional 'Run Capability Probe' button that executes live checks and updates the UI in real-time.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The lede claims the probe attempts a brief recognition trial, but the script only performs static property and permission checks.

edge_cases.rationale: Gracefully handles missing APIs, permission query failures, and secure context checks with clear UI fallbacks.

references.rationale: The parent index.html contains the required ChromeStatus reference link.

design_system.rationale: Consistently uses design system CSS variables, layout utilities, and semantic buttons with matching text/background states.

openQuestions.title: Implement recognition trial as claimed in blurb
openQuestions.detail: The page header states that the probe 'attempts a brief recognition trial to confirm each tier actually works', but no recognition is actually started. A brief, silent SpeechRecognition session should be initiated to verify that the API doesn't throw errors when started with different quality tiers.
